understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to win all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by maneuvering selectable pieces onto every goal tile (+) simultaneously in each level, with the game complete only when the engine reports WIN across all levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the selected piece in pixels (3 per cell), potentially pushing adjacent pushable blocks or being blocked by walls/objects; CLICK switches selection to another selectable piece at the exact target_position coordinates; walls and boundaries vary in blocking behavior and must be tested; multiple selectables require precise positioning on all goals at once to win, with limited steps per level.
